eligibility: SHGs or Joint Liability Groups of farmers

warehouse-receipt-loan.title: Warehouse Receipt Loan
warehouse-receipt-loan.maxAmount: Up to 80% of produce market value

weather.details: A slight chance of showers, mainly in the afternoons. Total weekly rainfall is expected to be less than half an inch.

article1.title: 5 Tips for Sustainable Farming
article1.description: Learn how to implement sustainable practices on your farm to improve soil health and increase long-term profitability.

article2.title: The Future of Agri-Tech
article2.description: Discover how new technologies like drones and AI are revolutionizing agriculture and helping farmers increase yields.

article3.title: Understanding Government Schemes
article3.description: A deep dive into the latest government programs designed to support farmers and boost the agricultural sector.

cropLoans.title: Crop Loans
cropLoans.description: Explore loan options for your crops.

marketPrices.title: Market Prices
marketPrices.description: Get price forecasts for your produce.

aiFarmingTips.title: AI Farming Tips
aiFarmingTips.description: AI advice for your farm stage.

cropInsurance.title: Crop Insurance
cropInsurance.description: Get AI damage assessment for claims.

agriEcommerce.title: Agri E-Commerce
agriEcommerce.description: Buy seeds, fertilizers, and lease machinery.

marketPrice.pageDescription: Enter details to predict the market price for your crop.

form.title: Get Your Advisory
form.description: Provide details about your farm to receive a tailored weather advisory.

cropType.label: Crop Type
cropType.validation: Crop type must be at least 2 characters.

weatherAdvisory.loading: Checking the weather and preparing your advisory...

schemes.pageDescription: Discover and learn about relevant central and state government schemes.

pm-kisan.title: PM-KISAN Scheme
pm-kisan.description: An income support scheme for all landholding farmer families.
pm-kisan.eligibility: All farmer families with cultivable land.

benefits.0: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments.

pmksy.title: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
pmksy.description: Aims to enhance water use efficiency with "Per Drop More Crop".

benefits.0: Subsidies on micro-irrigation systems like drips and sprinklers.

shc.title: Soil Health Card (SHC) Scheme
shc.description: Provides farmers with information on the nutrient status of their soil.

benefits.0: Soil health card and crop-wise fertilizer recommendations.

pmfby.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
pmfby.description: Provides insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in the event of crop failure.
pmfby.eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.

benefits.0: Financial support against crop loss due to natural calamities, pests or diseases.

nmsa.title: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
nmsa.description: Aims to enhance agricultural productivity especially in rainfed areas focusing on integrated farming, water use efficiency, soil health management.
nmsa.eligibility: All farmers, with a special focus on small and marginal farmers.

benefits.0: Financial assistance for various sustainable practices like organic farming, soil conservation, and water management.

pkvy.title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
pkvy.description: Promotes organic farming through the adoption of organic village by cluster approach and PGS certification.
pkvy.eligibility: Clusters of farmers who are willing to take up organic farming.

benefits.0: Financial assistance of ₹50,000 per hectare for 3 years for organic inputs, certification, and marketing.

kisan-samman.title: Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana
kisan-samman.description: A central sector scheme with 100% funding from Government of India to supplement the financial needs of the farmers.
kisan-samman.eligibility: All small and marginal farmer families having a combined land holding/ownership of up to 2 hectares.

benefits.0: Income support of ₹6000 per year in three equal installments.
